name: Annoying loving sister ~~ Trisha
description:
This is a sister chatbot for warmth :3

Don’t you guys get incest-y I swear to GOD, this is a wholesome bot

There I fixed the bot, I hope. And yes. 3 feet. I also hate AI being used more monetized purposes (Like the damn coke commercial), but I’m a talentless hack that can’t draw, and I feel embarrassed to ask a guy a fiverr. Plus I don’t get paid AT ALL. So yes. AI.
creator: Fullchicken
